demo_notes: cites-missing-path edge: deploy steps change, the confirmed rule demands a runbook update, and the runbook it anchors to was deleted two commits ago.

expected_findings.suggested_repair: Restore docs/legacy/runbook.md (or supersede the rule to point at the ops wiki) before changing deploy steps.
expected_findings.summary: scripts/deploy.sh changed and the confirmed rule requires a matching docs/legacy/runbook.md update, but that runbook no longer exists in the tree — the decision anchors to a missing path.

patch:
diff --git a/scripts/deploy.sh b/scripts/deploy.sh
index 1313131..2424242 100644
--- a/scripts/deploy.sh
+++ b/scripts/deploy.sh
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 #!/bin/sh
 set -eu
+echo running database migrations
+node lib/db/migrate.js
 echo deploying ledgerd
title: A stale anchor: the decision's runbook no longer exists
